description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a matte dark gray or black finish. The front face displays three open shelves at the top, ideal for storing books, decor, or small items, and two spacious drawers at the bottom, each equipped with a horizontal handle for easy access. The sides and back are solid panels, providing structural support and a clean, enclosed appearance. The unit stands on four short legs, slightly elevating it above the ground, which adds to its contemporary aesthetic and makes cleaning underneath easier. The handles on the drawers are metallic, contrasting subtly with the main body. This piece is suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, garages, or apartment hallways, offering both open and closed storage options.
description: A tall, matte dark gray shelving unit with three open shelves and two lower drawers, standing on four short legs. Features metallic handles and a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and two drawers with metallic handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the unit's depth and solid panel construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and solid side panel.
